hero.eyebrow: Spatial Data Scientist and GIS Developer
hero.description: I build geospatial ML systems that turn urban mobility data into environmental insight. MSc at Aalto University, Finland.

blocks.title: About
paragraphs: I build geospatial ML systems that turn urban mobility data into environmental insight. My MSc thesis at Aalto University applied transfer learning to predict CO2 emissions from private transport, training on Espoo mobility data and successfully transferring models to Helsinki.

My technical stack: Python, GeoPandas, PostGIS, SQL, Leaflet, OpenLayers, Flask, Django, AWS, Azure. Day to day I work across the full geospatial data lifecycle, ingesting and cleaning large spatial datasets, building PostGIS databases, engineering spatial features, training and evaluating models, and delivering results through WebGIS interfaces.

items.school: National University of Sciences and Technology (NUST)

bullets: Executed high-precision geodetic measurements at the Nummela Standard Baseline using Vaisala interference comparator
Contributed directly to national EDM calibration infrastructure
Documented calibration procedures and measurement logs per NLS quality assurance protocols
Produced traceable records for national geodetic archives

items.company: National University of Sciences and Technology (NUST)
bullets: Designed and built backend data processing modules for internal research tools, reducing manual data handling steps in scientific workflows
Developed automated pipelines for ingesting and transforming structured datasets
Managed feature deployment from development through production
Supported integration of external data sources into internal systems
Converted ground-truth datasets into structured geospatial layers for ongoing environmental monitoring and technical reporting
Produced verified GIS outputs, classified raster layers and vector feature datasets, for climate and terrain assessment
Documented spatial data processing workflows to support reproducibility and handover within the GIS team

items.title: Transfer Learning for CO2 Emissions
items.description: Applied transfer learning to predict CO2 emissions from private transport, training on Espoo mobility data and successfully transferring models to Helsinki. Combined large-scale OD data processing, H3 spatial indexing, and ensemble ML into a reproducible Python pipeline.

items.title: Spatial Data Platform
items.description: Designed and built backend data processing modules for internal research tools. Developed automated pipelines for ingesting and transforming structured geospatial datasets. Integrated external data sources into internal systems ensuring compatibility and integrity.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.background: Consult independently on mobility analysis, environmental modeling, and spatial decision support. Available for project-based collaboration with research institutions and private sector clients.

contact.title: Let's work together
